title: First, Next, Last
description: Tiny picture stories to put in order, with spoken narration as the reward.
learningGoals: Practice narrative sequencing with first, next, and last
Connect cause and effect across a short picture story
Build oral-storytelling vocabulary through spoken narration
interactionModel: tap-tap or drag picture cards into the story slots in order
feedbackModel: correct placements sparkle with gentle praise; mismatches wiggle, speak a warm nudge, and return for another try; completed stories are narrated back
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
